title: Spicy Miso Ramen
description: A loud, aggressive take on the classic. Rich, fiery, and deeply savory broth loaded with chewy noodles and charred pork.

steps.title: Prepare the Tare
steps.description: In a small bowl, whisk together the red miso paste and doubanjiang until it forms a smooth, thick paste.

steps.title: Fry the Aromatics
steps.description: Heat oil in a pot. Toss in garlic and ginger. Add the ground pork and cook until browned and slightly crispy.

steps.title: Build the Broth
steps.description: Add the miso mixture and broth. Bring to a boil and let it simmer angrily for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.description: Cook noodles separately. Ladle the screaming hot broth over noodles and top aggressively with eggs and nori.

title: Triple-Stack Heartstopper
description: A close-up, high-contrast stack of beef, cheese, and grease. Not for the faint of heart.

steps.title: Sear Patties
steps.description: Smash the patties onto a screaming hot griddle until a dark crust forms.

steps.title: Melt Cheese
steps.description: Stack the patties with cheese slices between each layer.

steps.title: Toast Buns
steps.description: Toast buns in the residual beef fat until golden and crispy.

steps.title: Stack High
steps.description: Assemble with bacon and sauce. Serve with extra napkins.

title: Smashed Avocado & Corn Chaos
description: A vibrant, messy salad featuring bright avocado and charred corn. energetic and loud.

steps.title: Char Corn
steps.description: Quickly fry corn in a dry pan until scorched and flavorful.

steps.title: Mash Avocado
steps.description: Aggressively mash avocado with lime juice and salt.

steps.title: Crumble & Toss
steps.description: Combine corn, tomatoes, and mash on toasted sourdough.

title: Concrete Block Brownies
description: Thick, fudgy brownie squares that feel industrial. Maximum cocoa impact.

steps.title: Melt Chocolate
steps.description: Melt butter and chocolate until glossy and dark.

steps.title: Whisk Eggs
steps.description: Whisk eggs and sugar until pale and thick.

steps.title: Fold & Bake
steps.description: Gently fold in flour and bake at 180°C until the top cracks like industrial concrete.

title: Neon Shrimp Tacos
description: Shrimp marinated in neon spices, served with a punchy slaw.

steps.title: Spice Rub
steps.description: Toss shrimp in chili powder and salt. Sear until pink and curled.

steps.title: Slaw Prep
steps.description: Thinly slice cabbage and toss with yogurt and lime.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.description: Char tortillas over an open flame and load 'em up.

title: Morning Chaos Shake
description: High-speed nutrition for people who don't have time to sit down.

steps.title: Liquify
steps.description: Run on HIGH until it looks like a smooth fuel source.
